nodes.label: Home Screen — Sections with Plus Button
nodes.description: Home tab showing 'Tu ritual de hoy' and 'Mi aprendizaje del día' sections, each with a '+' add button in the top-right corner. Sections are empty/unfilled, prompting the user to configure rituals or add learning content. Bottom tab bar visible with Home, Explorar, IA, Comunidad, Perfil tabs.

properties.dev_panel: Mentex Tweaks panel open (Estado: Home, Activo; Estilo de Cards: Glass/Líneas/Plano; Tipografía: Geist/Inter/Manrope)

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks Dev Panel
nodes.description: Developer overlay panel visible in sections-plus-btn screenshot. Controls: AUTH (DEV) with skip/login screen options, ESTADO toggle (Inactivo/Activo), ACENTO color picker (teal), ESTILO DE CARDS (Glass/Líneas/Plano), TIPOGRAFÍA (Geist/Inter/Manrope).
